paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Gap Sentences Generation (GSG)**, a self-supervised pre-training objective that extracts and regenerates missing sentences from documents to mimic abstractive summarization, combined with Masked Language Modeling (MLM). Uses deterministic sentence selection based on importance scores (ROUGE-1 F1) to guide pre-training.
raw_extraction.application: Abstractive text summarization across diverse domains (news, science, emails, patents, legislative bills)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving abstractive text summarization through tailored pre-training objectives
raw_extraction.extension: Deterministic sentence selection based on ROUGE-1 F1 scores for generating gap-sentences, improving relevance to downstream summarization tasks.
raw_extraction.paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of PEGASUS with larger capacity (568M parameters) retaining the core GSG objective and deterministic sentence selection strategy. Achieves state-of-the-art performance on 12 downstream summarization datasets with minimal supervision.
raw_extraction.application: Abstractive text summarization across diverse domains (news, science, emails, patents, legislative bills)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving abstractive text summarization through scalable pre-training objectives
raw_extraction.paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces extracted gap-sentences for pre-training via masked span prediction, improving abstractive summarization performance over traditional masked language modeling.
raw_extraction.application: Automatic abstractive summarization across multiple domains (news, legal, academic, social media)
raw_extraction.license: Not explicitly stated (likely open-source given publication venue)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned for abstractive summarization on various datasets
raw_extraction.paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of PEGASUS-BASE with improved performance through larger model capacity and extended pre-training corpora.
raw_extraction.application: High-quality abstractive summarization across diverse datasets including news, patents, and academic papers
raw_extraction.license: Not explicitly stated (likely open-source given publication venue)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned for abstractive summarization on various datasets
raw_extraction.paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **extracted gap-sentences** for pre-training, where the model learns to reconstruct missing content from extracted spans, improving abstractive summarization quality over traditional masked language modeling.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: HugeNews, Common Crawl (C4), and other domain-specific corpora (Multi-News, Gigaword, WikiHow, etc.)
raw_extraction.application: Abstractive text summarization across diverse domains (news, medical, legal, social media).
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing abstractive summarization performance through specialized pre-training objectives tailored to gap-filling tasks.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned on abstractive summarization datasets (XSum, CNN/DailyMail, RedditTIFU, etc.)
raw_extraction.extension: Gap-sentence extraction enables targeted reconstruction of key phrases, improving coherence in generated summaries.
raw_extraction.paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.innovation: **Scaled-up version** of PEGASUS Base with increased capacity (1.3B parameters) to handle complex abstractive summarization tasks, maintaining the core gap-sentence extraction pre-training strategy but achieving superior performance on downstream benchmarks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: HugeNews, Common Crawl (C4), and other domain-specific corpora (Multi-News, Gigaword, WikiHow, etc.)
raw_extraction.application: High-performance abstractive summarization for large-scale news, academic, and professional texts.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of abstractive summarization models for high-quality, domain-generalizable summaries.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned on abstractive summarization datasets (XSum, CNN/DailyMail, RedditTIFU, etc.)
raw_extraction.paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.organization: Unknown (Authors: Jingqing Zhang, Yao Zhao, Mohammad Saleh, Peter J. Liu)
raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **PEGASUS**, a sequence-to-sequence model pre-trained using extracted gap-sentences to improve abstractive summarization performance by focusing on reconstructing missing content.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified large-scale text corpora (extracted gap-sentences used)
raw_extraction.application: Abstractive text summarization, news article summarization
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving abstractive summarization quality by leveraging gap-sentence pre-training
raw_extraction.paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **masked span extraction** using gap-sentences to improve abstractive summarization performance over traditional masked language modeling.
raw_extraction.application: Abstractive text summarization, news article summarization, long-document compression

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **extracted gap-sentences** for pre-training, where sentences are masked out and predicted in context, improving abstractive summarization performance over traditional masked language modeling.

raw_extraction.paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **masked span extraction** (gap-sentences) for pre-training, where the model learns to reconstruct missing spans of text rather than individual tokens, improving long-range dependency modeling for abstractive summarization.

raw_extraction.paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **masked span extraction** (MSE) and **gap-sentence generation** for abstractive summarization, improving contextual coherence by training on extracted gap-sentences rather than random masking.
raw_extraction.application: Abstractive text summarization, news summarization, document compression
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving abstractive summarization quality through novel pre-training objectives and data extraction techniques.
